changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM therapists t JOIN shifts s ON s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 1' WHERE t.is_active = true AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM shift_assignments sa WHERE sa.therapist_id = t.id);
